# Agentic Workflow Design & Formation Command Centre (AAWDFC)

The judge of legitimacy for anything the system builds of itself. Before a
machine-created workflow or skill is applied, AAWDFC decides whether it is
fit to exist: explained, constitutionally compatible, and structurally
coherent -- a sound role topology that delegates to personas that make sense
for the work. An illegitimate change is refused before it exists, on the
record; the evolution gate then applies what legitimacy and approval pass.

## Triggers

- Any machine-created workflow or skill proposed for application.
- Any change to the runtime's own role topology or governance.

## State

- `topology.json` -- the sanctioned role and delegation topology.
- `audit_trail.jsonl` -- the append-only ledger of legitimacy verdicts.
